code_repo_notes.emf-parent: Multi-module Maven project: pointsengine-emf, emf, dvs-emf, emf-ut, etc. Points engine, tier/slab entities, strategies, Thrift services.
code_repo_notes.intouch-api-v3: REST API gateway, maker-checker workflows, Spring MVC.
code_repo_notes.cc-stack-crm: DB schema, tables, indexes. Infrastructure repo containing critical data model definitions.
code_repo_notes.thrifts: Thrift IDL definitions for cross-service RPC: thrift-ifaces-emf, thrift-ifaces-peb, thrift-ifaces-points-engine.
code_repo_notes.api/prototype: Customer-facing REST APIs (JAX-RS/Jersey). Extended fields mechanism (ExtendedFieldResource, ExtendedFieldFacade). Communication subscription management. MongoDB-backed extended field storage.

3.reason: Backend-only scope (KD-04). Chrome MCP unavailable for v0.app extraction. PRD defines all API contracts.

scope_changes: E4 (Enrollment Operations) removed from scope per KD-16

in_scope: E3 (Subscription Programs) -- CRUD, maker-checker, subscription-benefits linking with dummy benefit objects
out_of_scope: E4-original (Benefit Categories -- real impl deferred, dummy objects used)
PRD-E4/Enrollment Operations (E4-US1 through E4-US4 removed per KD-16)
